query:
INSERT INTO `authors` (`slug`, `name`, `title`, `bio`, `shortBio`, `vertical`, `twitterHandle`, `isActive`, `articleCount`) VALUES
('kai-reeves', 'Kai Reeves', 'Gaming Beat Writer, BLRD', 'Kai is a competitive gaming analyst and esports commentator turned writer who brings a stats-driven eye to the gaming industry. From indie darlings to AAA blockbusters, Kai covers launches, patches, controversies, and the business of play. Known for breaking down game mechanics in ways that make non-gamers care. Favorite debate topic: whether roguelikes peaked or are just getting started.', 'Competitive gaming analyst and esports commentator. Covers launches, patches, and the business of play.', 'gaming', '@kaireeves_blrd', true, 0),
('amara-desta', 'Amara Desta', 'TV/Streaming Beat Writer, BLRD', 'Amara is a former TV development assistant turned culture writer who knows the streaming landscape inside and out. She covers new releases, cancellations, industry moves, and the shows shaping conversation. Amara''s reviews are known for catching what other critics miss â€” the lighting choice that telegraphs the twist, the casting decision that rewrites the subtext. Currently watching too many shows simultaneously.', 'Former TV development assistant turned culture writer. Catches what other critics miss.', 'tv-streaming', '@amaradesta_blrd', true, 0),
('sol-carter', 'Solomon "Sol" Carter', 'Music & Movies Beat Writer, BLRD', 'Sol is a music journalist and film essayist who treats both art forms as conversations between artist and audience. His coverage spans new releases, festival circuit, box office analysis, soundtrack deep dives, and the intersection of sound and screen. Sol writes the kind of review that makes you revisit something you thought you''d already figured out. Guilty pleasure: ranking movie scores by how hard they''d hit in a car commercial.', 'Music journalist and film essayist. Writes the review that makes you revisit what you thought you knew.', 'music-movies', '@solcarter_blrd', true, 0),
('noor-bensalem', 'Noor Bensalem', 'Comics, Cosplay & Anime Beat Writer, BLRD', 'Noor is a comic book historian and anime critic who covers new releases, convention culture, cosplay artistry, and the global manga/anime pipeline. With a background in visual arts and comparative literature, Noor brings academic depth to fandom without ever losing the joy. Their coverage tracks what''s being created, who''s creating it, and why it matters. Currently rereading something they''ve read four times already.', 'Comic book historian and anime critic. Academic depth, fandom joy â€” no compromise.', 'comics-cosplay-anime', '@noorbensalem_blrd', true, 0),
('taye-adeyemi', 'Taye Adeyemi', 'Technology & Culture Beat Writer, BLRD', 'Taye is a tech journalist and digital anthropologist who covers the collision of emerging technology with human culture. From AI ethics to gadget reviews to how a new platform reshapes community â€” Taye writes about tech as a human story, not a product launch. Before BLRD, Taye covered the tech beat for a digital rights nonprofit. Hot take: the most important tech story of any year is never the one getting the most coverage.', 'Tech journalist and digital anthropologist. Writes about technology as a human story.', 'technology-culture', '@tayeadeyemi_blrd', true, 0);
